body:
#### PR description:

Backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51379 and https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51478 to 20.0.X since I forgot to backport the former. Let me know if this needs to be split into two PRs.
title: [20.0.X] SiPixelDigi collections in AlCaRecos and correction of compatible det propagation
